overall.description: A static cinematic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront, showcasing a dense skyline of glass skyscrapers mixed with industrial shanty structures along a murky river. The scene is rendered in a game engine with bright morning sunlight casting a warm glow over the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront industrial district with shanty settlements

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape from an elevated waterfront vantage point

entered.detail: red metal truss bridge spanning across the river with industrial supports
dense cluster of futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers with neon accents
cluttered waterfront settlement with shipping containers and makeshift structures
wide river with murky green water filling the foreground
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke plumes into the sky

segments.scene_description: A completely static panoramic view of a cyberpunk waterfront district. The camera overlooks a wide river toward a futuristic skyline dominated by glass towers, with a distinctive red bridge on the left and a dense industrial shanty town on the right. Smoke rises from distant industrial stacks while morning sunlight bathes the entire scene in warm light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, panoramic vista of a cyberpunk waterfront that captures the contrast between futuristic luxury and industrial decay under a morning sun. It begins with a wide overlook of a murky river, framing a skyline dominated by towering glass skyscrapers. As the eye moves across the horizon, the scene shifts from the sleek architecture of the city and a distinctive red bridge on the left toward a dense, sprawling industrial shanty town on the right. The composition is tied together by plumes of smoke rising from distant stacks, all while the warm, golden light of the morning bathes the entire urban landscape.
